chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 367 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of bail application 18.08.2023 Mr. Ghulam Muhammad Channa, Advocate for applicant along with applicant Muhammad Panjal present on interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Muhammad Iqbal Kalhoro, J. – On account of previous enmity over agricultural land allegedly applicant and six other accused, who were armed with Kalashnikovs, caused firearm injuries to son of complainant on 08.03.2023 near Pakistan House, Sukkur as reported by complainant on 09.03.2023 at Police Station Tamachani, District Sukkur. Applicant has not been shown armed with any weapon and is assigned the role of instigating the co-accused to commit the offence. 2. Learned Counsel for applicant has pleaded for confirmation of bail, which is conceded by learned Deputy Prosecutor General on the ground that the role assigned to the applicant is yet to be determined in the trial. Besides, there is one-day delay in registration of the FIR, which in the context of running enmity between the parties is not ignorable and, therefore, false implication of the applicant, not assigned any role of causing injuries to the victim, cannot be ruled out. 3. Accordingly, this application is allowed and interim pre-arrest bail granted to the applicant, vide order dated 02.06.2023, is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
